## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] test (tests added/updated)
- [ ] chore (tooling/config/dependencies)

## Related Issues

Link related issue(s), if any:

- Closes #

## Validation

Commands run locally:

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run typecheck
- [ ] npm run build

## UI Verification

For UI changes only:

- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Added screenshots or short video (if useful)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the repository coding standards.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where relevant, or explained why not needed.
- [ ] I verified no secrets or environment-specific values were committed.
